**Internal Deal Memo: Project Phoenix**

To: Acquisition Committee  
From: Dr. Gerald Tan, Lead Analyst  
Date: 12 October 2023  

Subject: Overview of Proposed Acquisition - Project Phoenix

We are pleased to present the internal assessment for the unannounced acquisition under Project Phoenix. The target entity, Quantum Solutions Pte Ltd (UEN: T12PQ3456L), is set for acquisition at an estimated valuation of SGD 75,000,000. This strategic move aims to bolster our technology portfolio and expand market presence in Southeast Asia.

Mr. Leonard Lim, CEO of Quantum Solutions, has expressed preliminary interest and is amenable to a phased integration plan. For further discussions, Mr. Lim can be reached at leonard.lim@quantumsol.sg or via phone at +65 9123 4567.

Please note that all communications regarding this project should reference my NRIC: S2345678Z for confidentiality purposes. Further updates will be provided in the upcoming committee meeting scheduled for 20 October 2023.

Best Regards,  
Dr. Gerald Tan  
Lead Analyst
